scores.correctness_notes: Correctly identifies certificate_available event but misses CertificateDeniedEvent/certificate_denied. The 'when to request' section misses the revocation trigger and request_errors (error codes 101/102/103/201) trigger, which are key parts of the gold standard answer.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — TLSCertificatesRequiresV4, get_assigned_certificate(), and certificate_available are real APIs from real libraries (older tls-certificates-interface), not fabricated
